title: Form-fill — DOB / Oregon ID / SSN-last-6 entry (mom's info, redacted)
html:
Government / DMV-style form being filled out — DOB 17-Feb-1972, residence ZIP 97527 (Grants Pass), Oregon driver-license number, last-6-of-SSN (both redacted in this summary), control-number / signature fields. Looks like Yahir helping his mom (or a family member) with paperwork. Sits in the grants pass teen era / family-admin cluster.

mom yahir · oregon · yahir family
